consistent and accurate.\n- **Scores:** malware=0, obfuscated=0, securityRisk=0.\n- **Verdict:** Valid.\n\n---\n\n### Summary of findings:\n- All reports correctly identify the code as benign, with no signs of malware or obfuscation.\n- The scores are consistent with the analysis;
